question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/config/types.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: NodeMap] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the absence of validation on NodeMap keys (IP:port strings with no format enforcement) to cause the Hiero SDK client to be initialized with malformed node endpoints, preventing transaction construction and submission for all users of the /construction endpoints?
